title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

Termination of Interruption

Okan Homepage

Administrative

Registration

Termination of Interruption

MENU

At the end of the interruption period, students continue their education as before. Students who have interrupted their registration for health conditions should provide the university with a certificate from a health institution, confirming their aptitude for continuing their studies.

Students should apply for the termination of interruption until the end of the Add/Drop week of the semester concerned.
